title: US releases text of Iran peace plan as Trump says deal averts ‘worldwide depression’

content: The Trump administration has released the text of its 14-point agreement with Iran, claiming it delivered a “major win” for the United States – even as it made significant political and financial concessions to Iran to reopen the strait of Hormuz and... [7385 chars]

title: England v Croatia: Strong start to second half as Bellingham brings score to 3-2
description: Ranked 11th in the world, Croatia has been a thorn in England’s side in previous years, most famously beating them in the semi-finals of the 2018 World Cup. | ITV National News
content:
A third goal from the Three Lions has put England back in the lead in their opening World Cup match against fellow European heavyweights Croatia.

title: Finland's parliament passes bill in support of lifting total ban on nuclear weapons
description: Finland dropped decades of military non-alliance to join NATO in April 2023 in response to Russia's full-scale invasion of Ukraine.
content:
Finland's parliament voted to lift a total ban on nuclear weapons on Wednesday, to bring the country in line with NATO's deterrence policy after joining the alliance in 2023.
The bill will permit nuclear weapons to be brought, transported, supplied, ... [1467 chars]

title: accused teenager 'expelled from school', court hears
description: A teenage boy is accused of fatally stabbing nine-year-old Aria Thorpe at her Weston-super-Mare home.
content:
Teen 'expelled from school hours before girl's death'
A teenage boy accused of fatally stabbing a nine-year-old girl had been expelled from school hours before her death, a court has heard.
